content.en:
Ye Tian's Aochen copy body is now just an ordinary member of the Reincarnation Celestial Clan, and if he wants to be valued by the high-level of the Reincarnation Celestial Clan and enter a higher level of circle, he must show his talent and strength.

"You have to show your strength!"

Ye Tian muttered.

Of course.

He will not reveal the fourth path, otherwise it is easy to reveal his identity.

If the Reincarnation Celestial Clan knew the information of the land on the other side of eternity, and knew that the fourth path was born in the land of the other side of eternity, then he also embarked on the fourth path, and his identity would be questionable.

So, in any case, the fourth way cannot be revealed.

However, he can reveal the supreme supernatural power of reincarnation.

The Supreme Divine Power of Reincarnation is the bloodline of the Reincarnation Celestial Clan, and even if it is exposed, it will only make the Reincarnation Celestial Clan pay attention to it, rather than be suspected by them.

Reincarnation of the ancient mountain.

In the depths of a void, three majestic figures were chatting here.

They are the true high-level of the Reincarnation Heavenly Clan, and they are also the three Origin Upper Realm Overlords of the Nine Awakenings.

"I just got the news that a clansman advertised that he had awakened the supreme power of reincarnation!"

Nine Awakenings Origin Upper Realm Overlord Yazu said.

"Yazu, this news is not necessarily true, there is no way to detect the supreme divine power of reincarnation, many clansmen don't even know what the supreme divine power of reincarnation is, they must be allowed to enter the ancient mountain of reincarnation to test it. Jun Zu, another Origin Upper Realm Overlord who had awakened nine times, said.

"Then let that clansman come to the reincarnation ancient mountain to test, if it is really born the supreme power of reincarnation, it must be cultivated well. Such a clansman, once he grows to a level like ours, his combat power can far surpass that of an ordinary Nine Awakening Origin Upper Realm Overlord!" Yazu said.

......

Fengyu City.

Ye Tian reported the news of his awakening of the Reincarnation Supreme Divine Power, and the Reincarnation Heavenly Clan would definitely attach importance to it.

Really.

He soon received a notice from the high-level of the Reincarnation Heavenly Clan to let him go to the Reincarnation Ancient Mountain.

Swish!

Ye Tian immediately went to the Ancient Mountain of Reincarnation.

It didn't take long for him to come to the Ancient Mountain of Reincarnation.

At this time, a member of the Reincarnation Heavenly Clan who had awakened eight times appeared in front of Ye Tian, this was the initiative to pick him up, this kind of treatment is not bad!

"I've seen Lord Ji Yuan!"

Ye Tian showed due respect.

"Aochen, come with me!"

Ji Yuan took Ao Chen to a void somewhere in the Ancient Mountain of Reincarnation.

Then.

Ye Tian sensed a terrifying aura, the weakest was the Eight Awakening Origin Upper Realm Overlords, and there seemed to be an existence far beyond the Eight Awakening Origin Upper Realm Overlords, that must be the Nine Awakened Origin Upper Realm Overlords!

"Nine Awakenings of the Origin Upper Realm Overlord!"

Ye Tian was secretly surprised.

With this kind of existence, it seems that there is only one Origin Ancestor in the land of eternity, and the Origin Ancestor has long been unaware of the countless years of falling!

It can be said that any reincarnation celestial clan that has awakened nine times will be unstoppable when it enters the land of eternity.

"I don't know how many Origin Upper Realm Overlords the Reincarnation Heavenly Clan has with Nine Awakenings, is there a Origin Upper Realm Overlord who has surpassed the Nine Awakenings?" Ye Tian thought secretly in his heart.

Then.

A majestic voice came.

"Ao Chen, use your reincarnation supreme supernatural power, if you deliberately deceive me and others, you will be severely punished!"

Hearing this voice, Ye Tian no longer hesitated, and cast the supreme divine power of reincarnation-the Spear of the Ruin Heaven!

Airplanes!

The spear of the ruins unleashed itself and slammed into the void.

Click!!

The void of the Ancient Mountain of Reincarnation was cracking inch by inch, which showed how powerful this blow was.

"It's really the supreme divine power of reincarnation!! many high-level leaders of the reincarnation celestial clan were shocked.

Yazu, Junzu, and another Trout Ancestor, the Origin Upper Realm Overlord who had awakened nine times, also showed a look of surprise.

"Hahahaha, our clan has given birth to another genius who has awakened the supreme power of reincarnation!"

They excitedly said.

Immediately.

They let the other high-level of the Reincarnation Celestial Clan leave, leaving behind Ao Chen.

......

Airplanes!

The surrounding void transforms.

Ye Tian found himself in a large hall, and in front of him sat three Origin Upper Realm Overlords of the Reincarnation Heavenly Clan, and the aura on their bodies was extremely terrifying, far surpassing the eight awakening Origin Upper Realm Overlords like Ji Yuan.

"Three reincarnation celestials who have awakened nine times!"

Ye Tian immediately said respectfully: "I've seen three ancestors!"

"Aochen, this seat is Yazu!"

"This seat is Junzu!"

"This seat is the Trout Ancestor!"

The three Reincarnation Heavenly Clan's Nine Awakening Origin Upper Realm Overlords introduced themselves separately.

Immediately, Yazu, as a representative, spoke: "Ao Chen, you are very good, at present, there are only six people in the Reincarnation Heavenly Clan who have awakened the supreme divine power of reincarnation, of course, there are some existences that have created the supreme divine power of reincarnation, but the supreme divine power of reincarnation created consumes a lot, but the power is not as good as the innate awakening of the supreme divine power of reincarnation." "

"The created reincarnation supreme divine power consumes a lot, and the power is not as good as the awakened reincarnation supreme supernatural power?"

Ye Tian didn't know about this yet, but this was the first time he knew about it.

Yazu continued: "Ao Chen, if you have any questions in the future, you can ask us, and we will try to answer them for you. In addition, your treatment will also be greatly improved. "

"Thank you, three ancestors!"

Ye Tian showed an excited look.

Subsequently.

Ye Tian asked a few questions about cultivation, and after receiving answers, he asked a key question.

"Three Ancestors, do we Reincarnation Heavenly Clan have an Origin Upper Realm Overlord who has surpassed the Nine Awakenings?" Ye Tian asked.

Yazu didn't think there was anything wrong with this question, he just thought that Ao Chen was just curious, so he answered directly: "No, it is too difficult to break through above the overlord of the Origin Upper Realm of the Nine Awakenings, and there are a total of seven people in the history of our Reincarnation Heavenly Clan who have been awakened to impact this realm, and all of them have failed, and they have all died." Now, we have not had any clansmen to attack this realm for a long time, and they have all given up!"

The seven Origin Upper Realm Overlords who had awakened nine times had all failed and fallen?

Ye Tian was really shocked when he learned this information.

No matter how powerful the reincarnation celestial clan is, it can't break this shackle, it can be seen how terrifying this shackle is!

However, the Origin Ancestor seems to have broken through half-through, at least the physical body has broken through, but it has still fallen, but the Origin Ancestor's physical body has still created a treasure land, allowing the Origin Upper Realm Overlord of the Eternal Land to have a lot of resources.

If it weren't for the Origin Ancestor's physical treasure land, the land on the other side of eternity would be even weaker!
